mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_FESTIVAL.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO festival ( festival_id, place_id, api_content_id, event_start_date, event_end_date, play_time, event_place, spend_time, festival_grade, usage_fee, program, sub_event, sponsor1, sponsor1_tel, created_at ) VALUES ( #{festivalId}, #{placeId}, #{apiContentId}, #{eventStartDate}, #{eventEndDate}, #{playTime}, #{eventPlace}, #{spendTime}, #{festivalGrade}, #{usageFee}, #{program}, #{subEvent}, #{sponsor1}, #{sponsor1Tel}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT f.festival_id AS festivalId, p.place_id AS placeId, p.place_name AS title, p.address AS eventPlace, p.image_url AS firstimage, f.event_start_date AS eventStartDate, f.event_end_date AS eventEndDate FROM festival f JOIN place p ON f.place_id = p.place_id WHERE TO_CHAR(f.event_start_date, 'YYYYMM') <= LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0') || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') AND TO_CHAR(f.event_end_date, 'YYYYMM') >= LPAD(#{year}, 4, '0') || LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0') ORDER BY f.event_start_date ASC

SELECT f.festival_id AS festivalId, p.place_name AS title, p.address AS eventPlace, p.latitude AS mapy, p.longitude AS mapx, f.event_start_date AS eventStartDate, f.event_end_date AS eventEndDate, f.play_time AS playTime, f.spend_time AS spendTime, f.festival_grade AS festivalGrade, f.usage_fee AS usageFee, f.program AS program, f.sub_event AS subEvent, f.sponsor1 AS sponsor1, f.sponsor1_tel AS sponsor1Tel FROM festival f JOIN place p ON f.place_id = p.place_id WHERE f.festival_id = #{festivalId}

SELECT image_id AS imageId, festival_id AS festivalId, origin_img_url AS originImgUrl, small_img_url AS smallImgUrl, img_name AS imgName FROM festival_image WHERE festival_id = #{festivalId} ORDER BY image_id ASC
